test.query: SELECT arraySort(arrayMap(x -> to{type}(cityHash64(number, x)), range(32))) FROM numbers(2000000) FORMAT Null
SELECT arrayReverseSort(arrayMap(x -> to{type}(cityHash64(number, x)), range(32))) FROM numbers(2000000) FORMAT Null
SELECT arraySort(arrayMap(x -> toDecimal64(toInt64(cityHash64(number, x) % 1000000000000), 4), range(32))) FROM numbers(2000000) FORMAT Null
SELECT arrayReverseSort(arrayMap(x -> toDecimal64(toInt64(cityHash64(number, x) % 1000000000000), 4), range(32))) FROM numbers(2000000) FORMAT Null
SELECT arraySort(arrayMap(x -> toDecimal128(toInt64(cityHash64(number, x)), 4), range(32))) FROM numbers(2000000) FORMAT Null
SELECT arraySort(arrayMap(x -> toUInt8(cityHash64(number, x)), range(6))) FROM numbers(10000000) FORMAT Null
SELECT arraySort(arrayMap(x -> toUInt32(cityHash64(number, x)), range(2000))) FROM numbers(20000) FORMAT Null
SELECT arraySort(arrayMap(x -> toUInt8(cityHash64(number, x)), range(2000))) FROM numbers(20000) FORMAT Null
